title: Is it a sin does it violate Shabbat to construct a memorial or a memorialization on Shabbat? Circa the priest violating Shabbat in the temple?
body: # Is it a sin does it violate Shabbat to construct a memorial or a memorialization on Shabbat? Circa the priest violating Shabbat in the temple?
